cases.title: UserRepository.create persists bcrypt or argon2 hash in password_hash — no plaintext in Postgres
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running via Compose
identity-auth UserRepository wired to users table per database design §5.1
PasswordHasher service configured per tech stack §2 and §8 mandatory guardrails (bcrypt or argon2)
steps: Invoke UserRepository.create with plaintext password SecurePass123 and valid user fields
Query users.password_hash directly via SQL for the created row
Assert password_hash value does NOT equal plaintext SecurePass123
Assert password_hash matches bcrypt pattern (^\$2[aby]\$) OR argon2 pattern (^\$argon2)
Assert password_hash length is within VARCHAR(255) and typical hash output size (≥ 50 chars)
cases.expected: NFR-14 credential storage: password_hash column contains only bcrypt or argon2 digest; zero plaintext password persisted in users table

cases.title: AuthService.verifyPassword validates login against stored hash via real DB round-trip
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with user row created via UserRepository using password Workshop2026!
AuthService uses same PasswordHasher as UserRepository
No AuthSession exists yet for the user
steps: Call AuthService.authenticate with correct email and password Workshop2026!
Assert authentication succeeds and returns userId without exposing passwordHash
Call AuthService.authenticate with correct email and wrong password WrongPass99
Assert authentication fails with InvalidCredentials domain error
Query users.password_hash and confirm value unchanged after failed attempt
cases.expected: NFR-14 module boundary: password verification uses one-way hash compare; correct password authenticates; wrong password rejected; stored hash never mutated on failed login

cases.title: TS-01: Admin creates student account — password hashed at rest and login succeeds
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
No existing user with institutionalId SV2026999
PasswordHasher and UserRepository integrated per identity-auth module
steps: POST /api/v1/users with password StudentPass8 and valid student fields via admin session
Assert HTTP 201 Created; response User DTO contains no password or passwordHash field
Query users table and assert password_hash is bcrypt/argon2 format not plaintext StudentPass8
POST /api/v1/auth/login with created email and password StudentPass8
Assert HTTP 200 with session cookie and user profile returned
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-01 and NFR-14: account persisted with hashed credential; student can authenticate; no plaintext password in DB or API responses

cases.title: Password change via PATCH /users/:userId replaces password_hash with new bcrypt/argon2 digest
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with existing user and known password_hash value H1
Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with user:write
TestClock or timestamp capture for updated_at comparison
steps: Record beforeState: users.password_hash = H1 for target userId
PATCH /api/v1/users/:userId with password NewSecure99 via admin session
Assert HTTP 200; response contains no password fields
Query users.password_hash and assert afterState value H2 ≠ H1 and matches bcrypt/argon2 pattern
POST /api/v1/auth/login with old password and assert HTTP 401 InvalidCredentials
POST /api/v1/auth/login with NewSecure99 and assert HTTP 200 session issued
cases.expected: beforeState: old hash H1 valid for prior password; afterState: password_hash rotated to H2; old password rejected; new password authenticates per NFR-14

cases.title: POST /users with 7-character password returns 422 PasswordTooShort per VAL-03
preconditions: API server running with identity-auth routes
Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Valid user create payload except password set to 7-char string short12
steps: POST /api/v1/users with password short12 and otherwise valid body
Assert HTTP status 422 Unprocessable Entity
Assert response JSON contains errorCode PasswordTooShort and message Mật khẩu phải có ít nhất 8 ký tự
Query users table and confirm no row created for the payload institutionalId or email
cases.expected: HTTP 422 PasswordTooShort contract per validation rules VAL-03 and error-handling §3.1; NFR-14 minimum 8-character password enforced at API boundary

cases.title: GET /auth/me response envelope excludes passwordHash per API design §2.4
preconditions: Student account exists with bcrypt/argon2 password_hash in database
Authenticated student session via POST /auth/login
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with valid wecheck_session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response JSON user object contains id, institutionalId, displayName, email, role
Assert response JSON does NOT contain password, passwordHash, password_hash, or hash fields at any nesting level
cases.expected: HTTP 200 User DTO contract: credential hash never exposed via GET /auth/me per API design §2.4 and NFR-14 no-plaintext-exposure rule

cases.title: GET /users list response excludes password_hash from all items
preconditions: Multiple users seeded with password_hash values in database
Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with user:read (all)
steps: GET /api/v1/users with admin session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 with items array and nextCursor field per API design §3.1 cursor pagination
For each item in items assert no password, passwordHash, or password_hash property present
Assert no item value matches bcrypt (^\$2) or argon2 (^\$argon2) hash pattern in any string field
cases.expected: HTTP 200 user list contract: password_hash column never serialized to API clients per NFR-14 credential storage privacy

cases.title: POST /auth/login success response excludes password and hash fields
preconditions: Student account with password CheckInPass8 exists in database
No active session for the student
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid email and password CheckInPass8
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response contains user and session objects
Assert response JSON does NOT contain password, passwordHash, password_hash, or stored hash values
Assert Set-Cookie wecheck_session header present and value is session UUID not password
cases.expected: HTTP 200 login contract: authentication succeeds without leaking stored credential material per NFR-14 and FR-02

cases.title: TS-05: Login with valid credentials establishes session using hashed password verification
preconditions: Student account provisioned with password ValidLogin8 via admin POST /users
Student unauthenticated; check-in returnUrl prepared
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with email, password ValidLogin8, and returnUrl /check-in?token=test-token
Assert HTTP 200 with redirectTo preserving returnUrl
Assert session cookie issued
GET /api/v1/auth/me with session and assert authenticated student profile
Direct SQL query confirms password_hash remains hashed not plaintext ValidLogin8
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-05: valid credentials authenticate via hash verification; session established; NFR-14 hashing invariant preserved post-login

cases.title: Student denied POST /users — cannot provision accounts or set passwords
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Valid user create payload with password AttemptPass8 prepared
steps: POST /api/v1/users with valid JSON body including password using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Query users table and confirm no new row for attempted institutionalId or email
Assert no password_hash row created by unauthorized caller
cases.expected: NFR-14 rbac-negative: credential provisioning restricted to TrainingOfficeAdmin user:write; Student cannot create accounts or influence password storage

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /users — password hashing path unreachable for non-admin roles
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session
Valid user create payload with password InstructorTry8
steps: POST /api/v1/users with Instructor session and valid create body
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Query users table and confirm no new user row from Instructor attempt
cases.expected: NFR-14: only admin role reaches UserRepository.create password hashing path; Instructor denied per roles-permissions §2.2 user:write empty cell

cases.title: Password boundary: exactly 8 characters accepted; 7 characters rejected with PasswordTooShort
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Two create payloads differing only in password length
steps: POST /api/v1/users with password exactly1234567 (7 chars) and unique email test7@example.edu.vn
Assert HTTP 422 and errorCode PasswordTooShort
POST /api/v1/users with password exactly12345678 (8 chars) and unique email test8@example.edu.vn
Assert HTTP 201 Created
Query users.password_hash for test8 account and assert bcrypt/argon2 format not plaintext
cases.expected: NFR-14 minimum length 8 enforced at boundary: 7 chars rejected; 8 chars accepted and stored as hash per VAL-03

cases.title: Password max length 128 enforced — 129-character password rejected on create
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Password string of 129 ASCII characters prepared
steps: POST /api/v1/users with 129-char password and otherwise valid create body
Assert HTTP status 422 with validation error for password length
Query users table and confirm no row created
POST /api/v1/users with 128-char password and unique email and assert HTTP 201
cases.expected: NFR-14 VAL-03 max 128 boundary: oversized password rejected; 128-char password accepted and hashed

cases.title: Empty password on POST /auth/login rejected before hash comparison
preconditions: Student account exists in database
API server running
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid email and empty string password
Assert HTTP 422 or 401 with validation or InvalidCredentials error
Assert AuthService.verifyPassword or equivalent not invoked with empty plaintext against stored hash
Assert no AuthSession row created for the attempt
cases.expected: Empty password rejected at validation layer; no spurious hash comparison; NFR-14 credential handling does not persist or accept empty passwords on login

cases.title: Admin create-user form gates submit when password shorter than 8 characters
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated in browser
Admin user creation form at /admin/users/new or equivalent route
Form includes password field per validation rules §6
steps: Fill required fields with valid institutionalId, displayName, email, and role Student
Enter password short12 (7 characters) in password field
Attempt form submit or blur password field to trigger client validation
Observe inline validation message Mật khẩu phải có ít nhất 8 ký tự and submit button disabled or blocked
Change password to ValidPass8 and verify validation clears allowing submit
cases.expected: NFR-14 browser journey: UI enforces minimum 8-character password before account creation; localized VAL-03 message displayed; aligns with server PasswordTooShort contract

cases.title: Login form submits password over HTTPS; success response and profile page expose no hash
preconditions: Student account with known password BrowserTest8 exists
Browser navigates to /login
Network inspection available in Playwright test harness
steps: Fill email and password BrowserTest8 in login form
Submit login and wait for redirect to student home or returnUrl
Inspect network response for POST /auth/login and assert response body contains no passwordHash or hash fields
Navigate to profile or account settings if available
Assert DOM contains no password_hash, bcrypt digest, or argon2 digest strings; password input type remains password
cases.expected: NFR-14 browser journey: login flow never displays stored hash; API response from login excludes credential material; password field masked in UI

cases.title: Admin users list table renders no password or hash columns
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated in browser
At least one user exists with password_hash in database
Admin users list at /admin/users
steps: Navigate to /admin/users and wait for table to load
Inspect table column headers and assert no Password, Mật khẩu, password_hash, or Hash column
Inspect visible cell text in all rows and assert no value matches bcrypt or argon2 hash pattern
View page source or network GET /users response and confirm no hash serialized to client
cases.expected: NFR-14 UI surface: admin user list never exposes password_hash; table columns limited to id, institutionalId, displayName, email, role, active, createdAt per API User DTO

cases.title: Flow A step 4: student login uses hashed credential verification before check-in
preconditions: Admin seeded student roster with password FlowAPass8 per Flow A steps 1–3
Instructor opened Active session with valid QR token
Student unauthenticated
steps: Student POST /api/v1/auth/login with seeded credentials and returnUrl to check-in deep link
Assert HTTP 200 session established
Direct SQL assert users.password_hash is bcrypt/argon2 not plaintext FlowAPass8
Student POST /api/v1/check-in with authenticated session and valid coordinates
Assert check-in succeeds demonstrating hash-verified auth gate in Flow A workshop path
cases.expected: NFR-14 enforced in Flow A: student authenticates via one-way hash verification; plaintext never stored; check-in proceeds only after valid session from credential check

cases.title: POST /setup/first-admin persists bcrypt or argon2 hash — bootstrap password never stored plaintext
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with User.count = 0 (needsSetup true)
SetupService.createFirstAdmin wired with PasswordHasher per tech stack §3.4 and §8
PasswordHasher configured for bcrypt or argon2
steps: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with password BootstrapPass8 and valid institutionalId, displayName, email on empty DB
Assert HTTP 201 Created; response user DTO contains no password or passwordHash fields
Query users.password_hash directly via SQL for the created TrainingOfficeAdmin row
Assert password_hash value does NOT equal plaintext BootstrapPass8
Assert password_hash matches bcrypt pattern (^\$2[aby]\$) OR argon2 pattern (^\$argon2)
POST /api/v1/auth/login with created email and BootstrapPass8 and assert HTTP 200 session issued
cases.expected: NFR-14 bootstrap path per validation rules §3.1a: first-admin credential stored as one-way hash; plaintext never in users table; admin authenticates successfully

cases.title: POST /setup/first-admin with 7-character password returns 422 PasswordTooShort per VAL-03 §3.1a
preconditions: Empty database with User.count = 0; needsSetup true
Valid setup payload except password set to 7-char string short12
steps: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with password short12 and otherwise valid bootstrap body
Assert HTTP status 422 Unprocessable Entity
Assert response JSON contains errorCode PasswordTooShort and message Mật khẩu phải có ít nhất 8 ký tự
Query users table and confirm User.count remains 0
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup true
cases.expected: NFR-14 VAL-03 enforced on bootstrap path: 7-char password rejected; deployment remains needsSetup true; no plaintext credential persisted

cases.title: Setup form at /setup gates submit when password shorter than 8 characters
preconditions: Fresh deployment with User.count = 0; browser navigates to /setup
Setup form includes password field per validation rules §3.1a and AC-17b
steps: Fill institutionalId, displayName, and email with valid values
Enter password short12 (7 characters) in password field
Attempt form submit or blur password field to trigger client validation
Observe inline validation message Mật khẩu phải có ít nhất 8 ký tự and submit button disabled or blocked
Change password to SetupPass8 and verify validation clears allowing submit
Submit form and assert POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin succeeds with hashed credential persisted
cases.expected: NFR-14 browser journey on bootstrap path: /setup UI enforces minimum 8-character password before first-admin creation; aligns with server PasswordTooShort contract per VAL-03
